header.versionUpToDate: You are already on the latest version.

chat.empty: Start a new conversation by sending a message.
chat.promptPlaceholder: Type your message. Press Enter to send and Shift+Enter for a new line.

errors.imageRequired: Image edit requires at least one reference image
errors.imageOnly: Image edit only supports image uploads
errors.videoImageOnly: Video generation only supports image reference uploads
errors.imageProxyRequired: Image failed to load. Set APP Base URL and change image output format to local_url, local_md, or base64.
errors.videoProxyRequired: Video loading returned 403. Go to the admin page, set the APP Base URL, then change the video output format to local proxy mode (local_url or local_html) and retry.

chatkit.idleText: Click and authorize to connect to Grok Voice through ChatKit voice sessions.
chatkit.connectingText: Requesting a Grok Voice session and connecting to LiveKit...
chatkit.liveText: Connection established. You can now speak directly with Grok.
chatkit.outputMutedText: Speaker output is muted, but you can keep speaking.
chatkit.pausedText: The session is paused. Click start to continue the current voice session.
chatkit.errorText: The connection did not complete. Check microphone access and try again.
chatkit.endedText: The voice session has ended. You can start again at any time.

masonry.title: Masonry
masonry.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want. Press Enter to generate and Shift+Enter for a new line.
masonry.emptyText: Enter a prompt and images will appear here in order.

account.pageSubtitle: Manage the xAI account pool, quota posture, and runtime state used by Grok2API.
account.empty: No accounts available. Use Import Accounts or Add Account to continue.
account.addHint: Enter one token per line. Existing tokens will be skipped automatically.
account.importHintDefault: Supports .txt (one token per line) and .json ({pool:[tokens]}) formats.
account.importHintJson: The JSON payload already includes account type metadata. No additional selection is required.
account.importHintTxt: Enter one token per line. Imported tokens will be appended to the selected account type.
account.jsonEmpty: No importable tokens found in the JSON file
account.fileEmpty: No importable tokens found in the file
account.exportEmpty: There are no accounts to export
account.deleteConfirmOne:
Delete {token}?
This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteConfirmMany:
Delete {n} accounts?
This action cannot be undone.
account.disableConfirmBody:
Disable {token}?
The account will be removed from request allocation until it is restored.
account.restoreConfirmBody:
Restore {token}?
The account will be returned to request allocation.
account.batchDisableConfirmBody:
Disable the selected {n} accounts?
Disabled accounts are removed from request allocation and can be restored later.
account.batchRestoreConfirmBody:
Restore the selected {n} accounts?
Restored accounts will be returned to request allocation.

config.pageSubtitle: Manage Grok2API runtime parameters and default service behavior.

disabledTip.appUrlRequired: Configure the APP Base URL first

appUrl.label: APP Base URL
appUrl.desc: Root URL exposed by the application, for example https://your-domain.com. Required when local proxy delivery is enabled.

appKey.label: APP Access Password
appKey.desc: Authentication password for the admin surface. Existing sessions are invalidated immediately after a change.

apiKey.label: API Access Key
apiKey.desc: Authentication key for the OpenAI-compatible API. Separate multiple values with commas. Leave blank to disable authentication.

webuiEnabled.label: Enable WebUI
webuiEnabled.desc: Exposes the WebUI entry point. When disabled, related routes return 404.

webuiKey.label: WebUI Access Password
webuiKey.desc: Authentication password required to access the WebUI when enabled.

temporary.label: Temporary Sessions
temporary.desc: Requests are excluded from Grok conversation history, providing an ephemeral chat mode.

memory.label: Conversation Memory
memory.desc: Enables Grok Memory so the model can retain user preferences and context across sessions.

stream.label: Default Streaming
stream.desc: Default value applied when the request does not explicitly provide the stream parameter.

thinking.label: Default Reasoning Output
thinking.desc: Default value applied when the request does not explicitly provide the thinking parameter. When enabled, reasoning steps are returned in reasoning_content.

autoChatModeFallback.label: AUTO Chat Mode Fallback
autoChatModeFallback.desc: When an AUTO chat model has no available auto quota, automatically try the fast and expert chat quota windows.

thinkingSummary.label: Condensed Reasoning
thinkingSummary.desc: When enabled, reasoning steps are condensed into a structured summary. When disabled, the full raw reasoning stream is output, with multi-agent collaboration details and tool call traces.

dynamicStatsig.label: Dynamic Statsig
dynamicStatsig.desc: Generates a fresh Statsig device fingerprint for each request to reduce the likelihood of risk-control challenges.

enableNsfw.label: Allow NSFW Generation
enableNsfw.desc: Permits the image generation endpoint to bypass NSFW content filtering.

showSearchSources.label: Append Sources to Content
showSearchSources.desc: Search sources are always output in the search_sources field. This option controls whether to also append a ## Sources section to the response content (for backward compatibility with text-parsing clients).

customInstruction.label: Global Supplemental Instruction
customInstruction.desc: Injects a consistent system message into every request to enforce model behavior or establish a fixed role.

imageFormat.label: Image Output Format
imageFormat.desc: grok_url and grok_md return the native Grok CDN address directly by default. local_* modes download assets to the server first and re-expose them through the local proxy. base64 returns an inline Data URI. When Imagine Public Image Proxy is enabled, imagine-public images returned by the WebSocket are also proxied locally.

imaginePublicImageProxy.label: Imagine Public Image Proxy
imaginePublicImageProxy.desc: When enabled, imagine-public images returned by the WebSocket are downloaded to the server and delivered through the local proxy. When disabled, public images are returned directly.

videoFormat.label: Video Output Format
videoFormat.desc: local_* modes download video assets to the server and deliver them through the local proxy. Configure the APP Base URL first and account for outbound bandwidth usage.

refreshEnabled.label: Enable Quota Refresh
refreshEnabled.desc: When enabled, the system automatically switches to quota refresh mode. When disabled, it automatically switches to auto-retry mode.
refreshEnabled.help:
On: quota refresh mode. The scheduler periodically syncs real quota, and selection uses scoring.
Off: auto-retry mode. No upstream probing, uniform random selection, and auto-swap on errors for up to 5 retries.
Recommendation: turn this off for >10k accounts to avoid self-triggering upstream 429s.

maxInflight.label: Max Inflight per Account
maxInflight.desc: Maximum concurrent in-flight requests per account. Accounts at this limit are skipped by the selector (shared by both modes).

basicInterval.label: Basic Cycle (s)
basicInterval.desc: Shared cycle for the basic pool: used for background refresh in quota mode and for 429 cooldown in random mode. Default 86400s.

superInterval.label: Super Cycle (s)
superInterval.desc: Shared cycle for the super pool: used for background refresh in quota mode and for 429 cooldown in random mode. Default 7200s.

heavyInterval.label: Heavy Cycle (s)
heavyInterval.desc: Shared cycle for the heavy pool: used for background refresh in quota mode and for 429 cooldown in random mode. Default 7200s.

usageConcurrency.label: Refresh Concurrency
usageConcurrency.desc: Maximum number of parallel usage calls allowed during quota refresh.

onDemandMinInterval.label: On-Demand Refresh Interval (s)
onDemandMinInterval.desc: Throttle window for request-triggered refreshes such as 429 handling. Repeated triggers within the interval are coalesced into a single refresh.

imageCacheMaxMb.label: Image Cache Limit (MB)
imageCacheMaxMb.desc: 0 disables the limit. Applies only to locally proxied media files. When the limit is exceeded, the oldest files are removed until usage falls back to 60% of the limit.

videoCacheMaxMb.label: Video Cache Limit (MB)
videoCacheMaxMb.desc: 0 disables the limit. Applies only to locally proxied media files. When the limit is exceeded, the oldest files are removed until usage falls back to 60% of the limit.

nsfwConcurrency.label: NSFW Enablement Concurrency
nsfwConcurrency.desc: Token-level concurrency for bulk NSFW enablement. Each token requires three network calls.

refreshConcurrency.label: Usage Refresh Concurrency
refreshConcurrency.desc: Token-level concurrency used during bulk quota refresh.

assetUploadConcurrency.label: Asset Upload Concurrency
assetUploadConcurrency.desc: Global maximum concurrency for asset uploads triggered by file attachments across all incoming requests.

assetListConcurrency.label: Asset Listing Concurrency
assetListConcurrency.desc: Global maximum concurrency for the list_assets endpoint across all requests.

assetDeleteConcurrency.label: Asset Deletion Concurrency
assetDeleteConcurrency.desc: Global maximum concurrency for the delete_asset endpoint. Also used as the default token-level concurrency for bulk cleanup in the admin UI.

proxyMode.label: Proxy Mode
proxyMode.desc: Controls outbound proxy routing. direct sends traffic without a proxy, single_proxy uses a fixed proxy, and proxy_pool rotates across a pool.

proxyUrl.label: Primary Proxy URL
proxyUrl.desc: Outbound proxy endpoint for API traffic. Supports http, https, and socks5.

resourceProxyUrl.label: Resource Proxy URL
resourceProxyUrl.desc: Dedicated proxy endpoint for downloading images, videos, and other media assets. Falls back to the primary proxy when left blank.

proxyPool.label: Primary Proxy Pool
proxyPool.desc: Pool of outbound proxies for API traffic, one proxy URL per line.

resourceProxyPool.label: Resource Proxy Pool
resourceProxyPool.desc: Dedicated proxy pool for media downloads, one proxy URL per line. Falls back to the primary pool when left blank.

skipSslVerify.label: Skip SSL Verification
skipSslVerify.desc: Bypasses TLS certificate validation for the proxy server. Enable only when using self-signed certificates.

clearanceMode.label: Clearance Mode
clearanceMode.desc: Controls how Cloudflare Clearance is obtained and refreshed.

browserFingerprint.label: Browser Fingerprint
browserFingerprint.desc: curl_cffi browser fingerprint identifier. It should align with the JA3 profile expected by Cloudflare, for example chrome136.

userAgent.label: User-Agent
userAgent.desc: Request header User-Agent. It must match the browser used when the Cloudflare cookie was validated.

cfCookies.label: Cloudflare Cookies
cfCookies.desc: Full cookie string issued by Cloudflare, including fields such as cf_clearance.

flaresolverrUrl.label: FlareSolverr URL
flaresolverrUrl.desc: HTTP endpoint for the FlareSolverr instance.

challengeTimeout.label: Challenge Timeout (s)
challengeTimeout.desc: Maximum time allowed for FlareSolverr to complete the Cloudflare challenge.

refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval (s)
refreshInterval.desc: Scheduling interval for the prewarm task that refreshes the clearance cookie.

maxRetries.label: Application Retry Limit
maxRetries.desc: Maximum number of application-layer retries after a request failure. A value of 0 disables retries. Applies to chat.completions and responses.

retryCodes.label: Application Retry Status Codes
retryCodes.desc: HTTP status codes that trigger application-layer retries. Separate multiple values with commas, for example 429,503.

resetSessionCodes.label: Transport Session Rebuild Status Codes
resetSessionCodes.desc: HTTP status codes that trigger a transport-session rebuild for the proxy layer. Separate multiple values with commas.

chatTimeout.label: Chat Request Timeout (s)
chatTimeout.desc: HTTP connection timeout for chat and image-edit requests.

imageTimeout.label: Image Request Timeout (s)
imageTimeout.desc: Overall timeout for image generation WebSocket requests.

videoTimeout.label: Video Request Timeout (s)
videoTimeout.desc: Unified timeout for video generation requests.

nsfwTimeout.label: NSFW Processing Timeout (s)
nsfwTimeout.desc: Timeout applied to set_birth_date and enable_nsfw requests.

assetUploadTimeout.label: Asset Upload Timeout (s)
assetUploadTimeout.desc: Timeout for the asset upload endpoint.

assetDownloadTimeout.label: Asset Download Timeout (s)
assetDownloadTimeout.desc: Timeout for the asset download endpoint.

assetListTimeout.label: Asset Listing Timeout (s)
assetListTimeout.desc: Timeout for the asset listing endpoint.

assetDeleteTimeout.label: Asset Deletion Timeout (s)
assetDeleteTimeout.desc: Timeout for the asset deletion endpoint.

streamTimeout.label: Streaming Idle Timeout (s)
streamTimeout.desc: Maximum idle time tolerated while receiving streamed image data.

interRoundWait.label: Inter-Round Wait (s)
interRoundWait.desc: Wait time used after each image round to determine whether the server keeps the connection open. If CLOSE is not received in time, the existing connection is reused for the next round.

fileLogLevel.label: File Log Level
fileLogLevel.desc: Minimum log level written to log files. Can be configured independently from the console. Default: INFO.

logMaxFiles.label: Log Retention (days)
logMaxFiles.desc: Maximum number of daily log files to keep during rotation. Default: 7.

cache.pageSubtitle: View and manage local cache files, storage limits, and online account assets.
cache.onlineAssetDesc: are images and attachments stored on the Grok platform. Cleanup affects only remote files and does not remove local cache data.
cache.assetSummaryIdle: Load online assets from the right side
cache.emptyAssetsIdle: Click the top-right button to load online assets
cache.viewUnavailable: Preview is unavailable for this file
cache.clearSelectedConfirm: Clear online assets for the selected {n} account(s)?
cache.clearAllConfirm: Clear online assets for all {n} accounts? This action cannot be undone.
cache.cancelInProgress: Cancellation requested. Wait for the current batch to finish.
